blocks.text: Klæbo drops Norwegian Championship — a deliberate pre-season statement. And Hovland had a week to forget at Valspar, finishing T90 (+3) as Fitzpatrick claimed the title at -11.
🏎️ Fri 03:30 — Japanese GP at Suzuka; Russell leads Antonelli by just 4 points

blocks.label: 🚴 Spring Classics — Norway on cobbles
items: Fri 11:52 — E3 Saxo Classic: Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard fly the flag on punchy Belgian roads
Sun 11:00 — Gent-Wevelgem: Wærenskjold built for this — Norway's best shot at a Spring Classic
